entry.title: Re: How to attach the uploaded files of sap BPA to email

Hi @rohit_singhal;,

Thanks for the explanation.

And do you have any practice blog for the two ways you mentioned?

entry.title: Re: NWDS idle session timeout
entry.content: You can set it in the Preferences of NWDS -> Konfiguration of PI Tools -> Session Time Out (in Minutes)

entry.title: Cancel goods issue as material has not reached the customer
entry.content:
Hi All,

How can we cancel the goods issue, if we do a goods issue and find out that there is something wrong with the package, but material is still in out truck and has not reached the customer.

Do we still need to create a return PO or there is any process to cancel the goods issue and invoices in standard SAP?

entry.title: Re: Modernizing SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Payroll
entry.content:
@AndreaDri ,

No, it makes more sense to keep them separate. Although on a technology stack level S4HANA and ECP share a lot of simularities, ECP has services focussed on payroll which are missing on H4S4. Also ECP is being actively developed (e.g., the additions to PCC and the 'Explain my Pay Statement" functionality coming in the 1H 2025 release), H4S4 is stagnant and will not get these enhancements (or only on a limited level)

entry.title: Re: Now Available: Manage Your SAP Business AI Features Flexibly from a Single Place
entry.content:
Hi @JAEUK,

thanks a lot for your feedback. It took us a bit longer than expected to release the tab for all customers. Sorry for the inconvenience. Can you please revisit SAP for Me again? If the tab is still not visible, please reach out to our team: srinivas.muppalla@sap.com, we're happy to support.

Please note that the number of AI features that can be activated from the dashboard is still limited. We're working with high priority on extended this. Stay tuned.

Best, Lena

entry.title: How to get the commitment, Actual cost & Revenue of project using CDS view in public cloud
entry.content:
Dear Team,

I am using the CDS view I_ActualPlanJournalEntryItem to fetch the Commitment and Actual Cost & Revenue Values for custom report development in SAP Public cloud.

However, despite applying all possible filters, we are unable to obtain the correct Commitment and Actual Cost & Revenue Values for the project.

Could you please suggest the exact filters required to extract the correct Commitment and Actual Values? This is a high-priority request, as the delivery of the object depends on the accurate output. Or let me know the any alternate way to get these values.

Your prompt assistance on this matter would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Return case for material without master data
entry.content:
Hi,

I received a question from customer where they would like to create a return for a material without a material number and material master data. The original PO was created with an account assignment to cost center. The advanced return PO option is not an alternative as I've understood it. What are the remaining options for customer? They work with Public Cloud. They have received a credit memo invoice but have nothing to match it with.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sourcing and Procurement

entry.title: F2582 Team Utilization and Workers Management Hierarchy
entry.content:
We are able to execute the App [F2582 -  Team Utilization] based on the workers work agreement in the app [F6097 – Manage Workforce] where the manager is directly assigned to the individual workers, we are not able to execute the app for subordinate workers.

example

David Jones (P000057) is the manager of the following

  • P000045 Arthur Baily
  • P000049 Janice Short
  • P000111 Philip Johnson
  • 54321       Kiran Gardner
  • P000127 Jane Ford

And  Janice Short (P000049) is the manager

  • P000044 Carlos Sainz .

When David Jones (P000057) executes the App F2582 -  Team Utilization they do see the following

  • P000045 Arthur Baily
  • P000049 Janice Short
  • P000111 Philip Johnson
  • 54321       Kiran Gardner
  • P000127 Jane Ford

However David Jones (P000057)  does not see P000044 Carlos Sainz who David Jones (P000057) is ultimately the manager of as he is the manager of Janice Short (P000049).

Has anyone else encountered this issue and found a way to be able to manage this ? Thanks in Advance.

entry.title: Re: Setting up Realignment in IBP
entry.content:
Very good material Kunal Roy. 

Thanks for posting

entry.title: Re: Looking for SAP Table Related to Transport Management with Freight Amount Field
entry.content:
Hello @RB_kumar 

TM is built with BOBF / Business Object Processing Framework. Therefore TM data should be read with BOBF functions, not directly from DB tables. See SAP TM Enhancement Guide for details how to develop in TM with BOBF.

Transportation charges are implemented with the /SCMTMS/TCC_TRNSP_CHRG business object:

They are available in the TRANSPORTCHARGES and TRANSPORTCHARGES_INTERNAL nodes of the /SCMTMS/TOR object that implements freight orders:

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: SapUniversalID is Case-Sensitive on the User-Name?!
entry.content:
well: this seems fixed: 
today joachim[....] was fine again

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration Suite - Message Mapping - addContextChange in UDF is ignored

entry.title: Re: Introducing SAP Application Extension Methodology version 2.3
entry.content: Interesting ! Thanks for sharing !

entry.title: Re: Reference Design for SAP S4/HANA Side-by-Side Extension with SAP CAP deployed on SAP BTP CF
entry.content:
Security issue : you do not transmit the user data via urls.

I think you should use the same Identity provider instead with SSO and everything will be smooth and the user principal will be forwarded via the session token seamless by the workzone router

entry.title: How to blog in SAP Community
entry.content:
Sooo, apparently I still feel/hope SapCommunity is relevent;
And apparently, today is the first time since(...?) that I want to create a blog post here (I did quite a few in the past, though).

I learned:
1. I have to "join group" first (The group for ABAP beeing "Application Development and Automation Blog Posts ")
2. I don't get a "publish" button, but a ""submit for review"-one?!

well, ok.
Hope this works! *fingerscrossed* 🙂

entry.title: How to use bseg and for all entries in
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Since BSEG is a cluster table, it does not support JOIN, ORDER BY, or GROUP BY operations.

How should the code be written in this case?

 

I used a query as below,

   SELECT
B~BUKRS  C~SAKNR B~AUGDT B~AUGBL B~ZUONR B~GJAHR B~BELNR
B~BUZEI  B~BUDAT B~BLDAT A~CPUDT B~WAERS B~XBLNR B~BLART
B~BSCHL  "ZUMSK
 B~SHKZG  B~GSBER B~MWSKZ B~DMBTR B~WRBTR
B~SGTXT  B~HKONT
C~REBZG  C~REBZJ C~REBZZ B~XRAGL B~XREF1 B~XREF2
B~XNEGP  B~XREF3 B~BUPLA B~BUZID B~AUGGJ
APPENDING CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE GT_BSIS
FROM bkpf as A JOIN BSIS AS B ON
    A~BUKRS = B~BUKRS
    AND A~GJAHR = B~GJAHR
    AND A~BELNR = B~BELNR JOIN BSEG AS C ON
    B~GJAHR = C~GJAHR
    AND B~BELNR = C~BELNR
    AND B~BUZEI = C~BUZEI
      FOR ALL ENTRIES IN GT_BSISD2_E
WHERE A~BUKRS = P_BUKRS
      AND C~REBZJ EQ GT_BSISD2_E-REBZJ
      AND C~REBZG EQ GT_BSISD2_E-REBZG
      AND C~REBZZ EQ GT_BSISD2_E-REBZZ
      AND B~GSBER EQ GT_BSISD2_E-GSBER
AND ( C~REBZG NE SPACE
            AND C~REBZG NE 'V' ).

entry.title: Project system in Private Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

We have requirements for a customer to configure capital and logistics project for a Client who has selected RISE with SAP. However, there are no scope items for projects within Private Edition. How should we proceed if we want enable managing of enterprise projects for customer within SAP which would include Procurement and Production processes and also resource and time management? Can we do it by ourself by following the script from Public Cloud or do we need to request SAP as addional service under EML to help us in setting up the system?

Regards,
Arnab

entry.title: SAP B1: Can't perform Add/Update action to User-defined object Matrix Style
entry.content:
I can't perform Add/Update action to User-defined object Matrix Style form.

I've tried done it with DIAPI GeneralService & GeneralData and it works but can't add or update the data from the Matrix Style form. Also tried with Header Line Style and it works as well.

Only Link to Entity field not alphanumeric field.

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Company Code without Controlling Area Assignment
entry.content:
Hello!

I know that there is only one controlling area (A000) in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. Is there a way to create a company code that is not assigned to any controlling area?

Best regards,
Kaiwen

entry.title: SAP ASE HADR - database replication limit
entry.content:
Hello all,

for my client I am planning a migration of his stand-alone ASE 16.0 SP02 PL07 instances from AIX to RHEL. Our current HADR solution is actually a DR-only on OS-level by means of IBM PowerHA System Mirror.

We want to propose the client a HADR solution on database-level by means of SAP ASE HADR (Always-On) as he already pays for its components in ASE licences.

The highest ASE version that is compatible with client's application is 16.0 SP04 PL02 and this is our target. However, the client is aware that before 12.2027 he will need to upgrade to 16.1.

On HADR User Guide overview webpage for both SP04 PL02 and 16.1 versions - HADR Users Guide | SAP Help Portal  - we can read the following:


  • The HADR feature included with SAP ASE supports only a single-companion server. Versions SP03 PL03 and later support a three node architecture, with a companion SAP ASE server and a disaster recovery node.
  • You can manage multiple databases (certified with 20) at the same time in an HADR environment for custom applications using SAP Replication Server version 16.0 SP03 PL04 and later.

 

I asked SAP Support about this limit of 20 databases set for replication and they only confirmed, but also redirected by to Communities for guidance from professionals who have experience with this product.

My target instance has 24 databases in total. I assume that we don't set system databases (master, model, sybsystemprocs, sybsecurity, tempdb.) for replication as they need to remain instance-specific. If this is true, then I fall within this limitation as there are 15 user databases on my instance.

Still, I would like to confirm if it's technically possible to have more than 20 databases set for replication. I was told by a fellow ASE dba that because version SP03 PL03 and higher support a three-node architecture, you could have more than 20 databases replicated by means of spreading them across nodes 2 and 3. Is this true ? If not, are there other means to bypass this limitation ?

Thank you in advance !

entry.title: Re: Creating Custom Button and Event Handling in SALV (SAP List Viewer)
entry.content:
what is 

zif_na_salv_constants

entry.title: Quantities sold per warehouse
entry.content:
Hi all,

I would like to know the total quantities sold per warehouse of all items that were entered a year or more ago.

I have the start of query:

SELECT
T0.[CreateDate],
T0.[ItemCode],
T0.[ItemName]

FROM 
OITM T0 

WHERE 
T0.[CreateDate] <=[%0]

ORDER BY
1 DESC

The result must be someting like this:

------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATION DATE   ITEM CODE   ITEM NAME     WAREHOUSE1   WAREHOUSE2  WAREHOUSE 3
08-09-2022      APP         APPLE         1             82         0
14-12-2019      PEE         PEER          84           160         0
25-07-2018      ORA         ORANGES       120          180         14

Can someone help me with that?

entry.title: Reversal of Posted Depreciation for a specific period
entry.content:
We want to reverse the posted depreciation for a specific period and we want to stop posting depreciation against that asset in the forthcoming periods. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Reversal of Posted Depreciation for a specific period
entry.content:
Please remember there is no standard tool to reverse depreciation postings. Please check KBA 2450680 - Reversal of depreciation posting (AFAB) is not possible .

As for stopping depreciation for an asset, please check KBA 2444093 - How to "shutdown" an asset?

Alternatively, you could set depreciation key 0000 or MANU from a certain date in the time-dependent depreciation terms in AS02.

entry.title: Re: SAP PaPM Cloud: What’s New as of 2023-03-13?
entry.content:
Dear Leonora,

I am encountering an issue with report visualization in SAP PaPM Cloud (standard model). After having istantiated a process simulation, I created a report by dragging a query into the white workspace. This generated a default bar/column chart.

I wish to modify the chart type and colors used, but I am facing the following difficulties:

  1. When I access "Full Screen Mode" to customize the chart, the save button (floppy disk icon) is disabled. How can I save the changes and view the customized chart on the report's initial page (story page)?
  2. How can I change the colors used in the legend and data of the chart (e.g., the bar/columns)?

Thank you for your support.

Best regards,

Daniela C.

entry.title: SAP Subscription Billing now available on the Customer Influence Portal
entry.content:
In the past, requirements related to SAP Subscription Billing had to be posted through an SAP S/4HANA Cloud component.
Now, there is a new category for Subscription Billing to collect your requirements and feedback. 

Just follow this link to post your request.
If you want to learn more about the Customer Influence and Adoption programs, follow this link.

entry.title: Re: SAP Master data load into S4Hana or MDG?

@venkateshgollaThanks for this valuable input.

Loading into MDG can happen via Data Migration Cockpit or specific loading tiles.

The Data Migration Cockpit templates structure (tables and fields) are available in the tables of "/1LT/" domain.

Do you know if such description is available at database level for MDG loading tiles ?

Best regards

entry.title: Re: System News: Customizing the My Home news feed

entry.title: SAP CAR UDF: Running Modelling and Forecasting at Virtual (dummy) store level
entry.content:
Hi All,

We're currently implementing SAP UDF for a retail customer in the online channel. The customer has a centralized supply chain setup, where a single distribution center in one country supplies to customers in multiple countries, each assigned to a different distribution chain.

For example, our distribution center in Sweden supplies to customers in Norway, Denmark, and Iceland, which are assigned to distribution chains 100-10, 200-10, and 300-10, respectively.

We've set up virtual (dummy) stores for each distribution chain and are replicating sale orders from ECC to CAR using the DRF framework (PWEB object). These sales orders are replicated to the CAR /DMF/PS_TS table with virtual store mapping based on the distribution chain.

However, we're facing a challenge when running modeling and forecasting. We're unable to run these processes at the virtual store level, which is necessary since each distribution chain (country) has unique holidays and requirements.

We need to find a way to run modeling and forecasting for each virtual store to accurately capture the demand patterns for each distribution chain.

I'd love to hear your thoughts and any other ideas you may have. 

Regards,

Masilamani

entry.title: Re: Training, practice, free usage of system
entry.content: You may not access the learning tutorials. But for example if you want to learn SAP BTP. SAP provide demo environment for practice. Whereas SAP Hybris if you want to try there is no such option to learn except going thru with the documentation

entry.title: Re: Clear Open PMR from "Stage for Production" app
entry.content:
Well, the TECO mechanism the SAP standard for this purpose. 

If you want to filter the relevant PMR items by other attributes you should think about implementing the BAdI /SCWM/EX_MFG_STAGE_INFO. The fallback class of this BAdI is the SAP standard algorithm for the staging proposals. The fallback class is not final, so you can easily adjust parts of it.

entry.title: Re: Company Code without Controlling Area Assignment
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

And thank you for asking your question in the SAP Community blog.

In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, you're correct: there is only one controlling area (A000), and all company codes are assigned to this single controlling area by design. This is part of the standard configuration of the Cloud Public Edition to ensure simplification and standardization across financial and controlling processes.

 

So, to answer your question directly:

No, it is not possible to create a company code that is not assigned to any controlling area in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

 

Why?

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition uses a universal journal and integrated financial architecture, which mandates that all company codes must be part of the global controlling structure to enable end-to-end processes (like reporting, allocations, and planning) across Finance and Controlling.

 

I hope this will help you answer your question.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Re: Company Code without Controlling Area Assignment
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

 

And thank you for asking your question in the SAP Community blog.

 

In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, you're correct: there is only one controlling area (A000), and all company codes are assigned to this single controlling area by design. This is part of the standard configuration of the Cloud Public Edition to ensure simplification and standardization across financial and controlling processes.

 

So, to answer your question directly:

No, it is not possible to create a company code that is not assigned to any controlling area in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

 

Why?

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition uses a universal journal and integrated financial architecture, which mandates that all company codes must be part of the global controlling structure to enable end-to-end processes (like reporting, allocations, and planning) across Finance and Controlling.

 

I hope this will help you answer your question.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Assistance with Handling Overlapping Sales Order and Customer Number Entities in SAP CAI
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

I am currently facing a challenge in handling two entities, Sales Orders and Customer Numbers, within SAP Conversational AI (CAI). Both entities follow a similar pattern, consisting of digits in a 10-digit format.

To define these entities, I have set up the Sales Order as a regex entity with the pattern \d{10}, and the Customer Number as a restricted entity, with a list of values fetched from SAP. However, I am encountering difficulties in resolving the overlapping patterns between these two entities, as both consist of numeric digits and can vary in length from 1 to 10 digits.

Could you kindly provide guidance on the following:

How should I define the Sales Order entity to correctly handle varying input lengths, from 1 to 10 digits?

What approach should I take to ensure the bot processes these entities accurately and allows for the required input to be captured one by one?

I would appreciate any insights or suggestions on how to structure these entities and resolve the current issue.

Thank you for your time, and I look forward to your response.

Thanks!!

entry.title: Re: Error Handling - SAP S/4HANA migration cockpit
entry.content:
Hello, thank you for your message and for sharing the screenshot!

Just to clarify: the screenshot you shared is likely coming from the “Monitoring” or “Activities with Error” view, which is not sorted by default. When exported to Excel, the same unsorted structure is retained.

If you're looking for a more structured or sorted view, we recommend using the “Messages” button. The Migration Cockpit offers multiple options for reviewing errors — depending on whether you're analyzing by instance, message type, or other dimensions. These views are explained in detail in the Cookbook.

We’re continuously working on improvements, and some updates are already planned for future releases.

If you have specific suggestions for how this process should work differently, we encourage you to submit them via the SAP Customer Influence Program — this helps us track and prioritize ideas based on wider customer interest. (S-user login required; if needed, see KBA 2676589.)

Best regards,

Elizaveta

entry.title: Re: External Contingent Workforce for Customer Projects
entry.content:
Great blog!
I would like to understand when at the end of the month the invoice for the total hours worked in a month comes from the subcontractor, how can this invoice be posted against the goods receipt if there is a separate goods receipt for each individual time recording of the month?

entry.title: Re: CDP Data Access>>Exports feature
entry.content:
Hi Owen,

As of today, the customer data platform console’s export functionality (under Data Access > Exports) only supports full exports, and delta exports with scheduling option is not available.
Since delta export is a valuable use case, I recommend submitting a feature request outlining your business needs under this link: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/3427
SAP Product Management team will review the request and respond accordingly.
Hope this is helpful.thanks

Regards,
Anand Raj

Unable to read repository at https://tools.hana.ondemand.com/latest/content.xml.xz.
Unable to read repository at https://tools.hana.ondemand.com/latest/content.xml.xz.
PKIX path building failed: sun.security.provider.certpath.SunCertPathBuilderException: unable to find valid certification path to requested target
how to resolve it?

entry.title: Re: MBC(16R) requires any additional license in india?
entry.content: Scope SAP Multibank Connectivity is also available for India. https://me.sap.com/processnavigator/SolS/EARL_SolS-013/2502/SolP/16R?region=IN

entry.title: Sensitive compensation data RBP subjected not hidden during the hiring approval wf
entry.content:
Hi,

we are encountering an issue when enhancing our EC configuration with some custom firlds in job info and in comp info portlet dedicated to very sensitive topics . We hardly worked to discriminate visibility and editability over those fields via RBP.

But the same fields are visible when hiring a new person in the workflow approval . The effect is that hiring approvers, set by role to do not have those fields in visibility, isntead can see fiends and content in the hiring approval workflow.

We openea ah hign priority tk to SAP, but it looks like this is the expected behaviour. Se also note https://me.sap.com/notes/3577609 .

We are looking for a workaround solution or for a suggestion to bypass it. Thanks

entry.title: Re: Unable to read repository at https://tools.hana.ondemand.com/latest/content.xml.xz.
entry.content: Not entirely sure but could be that your traffic is routed through a proxy or VPN and therefor complaining about the certification path. You would have to manually enter the proxy and/or install the certificate.

entry.title: Re: How to Create Custom Tile for Custom Analytical Queries and Extend it using Custom Catalog Exten
entry.content:
@bradly1618   Thanks for content

Can we create a Custom Business Catalog  in sap public cloud  and make use of Custom Business catalog for assigning it instead of standard catalog under Add section ?

entry.title: Purchase order with history release strategy is restarted
entry.content:
Hi Experts

The release strategy of the released purchase order with partial goods receipt is restarted when the net amount of the purchase order is reduced.

The reduction of the amount happens because some of the items were cancelled or the quantity purchased in the item with partial attention was reduced and the new amount is in the range of another release strategy.

In the configuration of the release strategy for the release indicator is assigned the value 4 in the modification option

The business requirement is that the release strategy is only restarted when the purchase order has no goods receipt or service entry sheet. Even if the purchase order is not yet fulfilled, the release strategy should not be restarted if the new reduced amount is in the range of another strategy.

I look forward to your support if the above can be achieved with the standard configuration or if customization is required.

Best regards Percy

entry.title: Re: Transport SAP Cloud Integration (CPI) Artifact with SAP Cloud Transport Management
entry.content:
Hi

Thank you for great blog.

I have a question about CloudIntegration destination. 
Where this destination is used or can be configured? 

What in case if we have two separate CPI landscapes? 
Should we create dedicated TMS for each landscape ?  

Reg.
Artur

entry.title: Re: Promotion in Analyze Promotions App is not editable
entry.content:
I have raised ticket to SAP.  The issue in my promotion was, that only one product from the all products, mentioned in promotion has values, all others not. According to the IBP functionality it is not possible to create new values in already created promotion, this is why it is locked for editing.

Reason why only one product has values is, that promotion has been created not in base unit of measure and only one this product has conversion maintained.

entry.title: Re: SAP IBP Analytic stories - Drill option in table and charts
entry.content: Hi, this topics seems unanswered and I actually have the same issue. Has anyone found out yet?

entry.title: Re: Pre-Carriage and On-Carriage on Freight Booking
entry.content: Hi Ajit, thanks for the prompt response (as always :)). My problem is because we need to prebook capacity with the carrier months in advance and so we need to create the freight booking first. Unfortunately, the freight booking just won't expose the pre-carriage and on-carriage leg for manual entry. Interesting, if I create a container TU and create the FB from the TU, the pre-carriage and on-carriage stage are included. Regards SFC

entry.title: Re: CDP Data Access>>Exports feature
entry.content: Yes it does. Thank you very much.

entry.title: SuccessFactors Compensation Lookup table movement
entry.content:
From Import & Export Data, we can bulk export Compensation Eligibility Rule & Exception table & able to import to other instance (Test-Production).

Is there any option for bulk lookup table movement in instance.

@xavierlegarrec

entry.title: Re: C4C- Join Data Sources for External Pricing
entry.content: Good blog, it really helped me to generate a report with quote and external pricing. Below sequence wise I created a Inner joined data source. Result of the report is awesome.

entry.title: Converting transfer requests with the tx ME59N
entry.content:
Hi Experts

In S/4HANA, as standard, it is possible to convert stock transport requisitions to stock transport orders using transaction ME59N, just as is done with purchase requisitions for goods.

If possible you can help me by telling me in a general way the main configurations to be done and if you could share me a user manual it would be great.

Best regards Percy

entry.title: Re: Drill option of table disabled in stories
entry.content: Hello, how do I open the model? The question is for IBP Analytics Stories only. The drill down button remains grey. Thank you

entry.title: Re: CPI to CPI Connection and both tenants will be on different subaccounts at different regions.
entry.content:
Hi @Yogita1 ,

Communication between both CPI's is similar to communication between an external web application and CPI, so you don't have limitations about the number of calls. It is important to take into account the licensing model for messages, because a huge volume scenario can has an important impact: https://me.sap.com/notes/2942344

About latency, you must consider the location (cloud provider and region) where each CPI is deployed.

About payload size, here you have some information:

https://help.sap.com/docs/integration-suite/sap-integration-suite/optimize-performance

https://help.sap.com/docs/integration-suite/sap-integration-suite/limit-size-of-incoming-messages 

Hope it helps!

Regards,

Roberto

entry.title: Re: Unable to read repository at https://tools.hana.ondem...
entry.content:
yes like already mentioned below , in your Eclipse, please check proxy settings.

Window → Preferences → General → Network Connections

if on proxy, please give proxy details.

Thanks,

Arun

entry.title: Queries on CLT: Myanmar - GL settings
entry.content:
Hello,

Regarding CLT and rollout to Myanmar - GL settings:

1. As Germany will be the source country for Myanmar, and DEAP is the local ledger for Germany, is it necessary to assign DEAP against the Myanmar company code ? , or will the local ledger for Myanmar be available?

2. When should Germany be activated? Should Germany be activated from the start even if the first rollout outs are for standard Asian localized countries? Or should Germany be activated only when the rollout to Myanmar happens? 

Thanks and Best Regards,

Duarte

Lluis

entry.title: Not able to create tarball file in Java based CAPM project
entry.content:
I am following one tutorial for Java based CAPM project.

Below command is not working

npm pack creates a tarball from the products-service, which is then directly used as a dependency in the bookstore application. Learn more about npm pack.

You will find a sap-capire-products-1.0.0.tgz in the root folder of the bookstore project, which is the tarball file of the products-service project.

entry.content: Hi Jen, I mean from "Configuration Analysis: Search Personalizations and Customizings" and 'Reset Cache' option .

Everyone with a subscription to SAP Learning Hub is free to register.

entry.title: Re: Quantities sold per warehouse
entry.content:
Hi Jeroen,

Please give this a try:

 

SELECT
T0.[CreateDate],
T0.[ItemCode],
T0.[ItemName],
/* Replace the 1, 2, and 3 in r.WhsCode='1' with the actual warehouse codes: */
isnull((select sum(r.Quantity) from INV1 r inner join OINV h on r.DocEntry = h.DocEntry where r.ItemCode = T0.[ItemCode] and r.WhsCode='1'), 0) AS WAREHOUSE1,
isnull((select sum(r.Quantity) from INV1 r inner join OINV h on r.DocEntry = h.DocEntry where r.ItemCode = T0.[ItemCode] and r.WhsCode='2'), 0) AS WAREHOUSE2,
isnull((select sum(r.Quantity) from INV1 r inner join OINV h on r.DocEntry = h.DocEntry where r.ItemCode = T0.[ItemCode] and r.WhsCode='3'), 0) AS WAREHOUSE3

FROM 
OITM T0 

WHERE 
T0.[CreateDate] <= dateadd(year , -1, getdate()))

ORDER BY
1 DESC

Regards,

Johan

entry.title: Re: Stop requirement transfer when sales order is in approval
entry.content:
When i use Odata API to update the flag, the sales document will check status is in approval?

"error": {
"code": "/IWBEP/CM_MGW_RT/022",
"message": {
"lang": "en",
"value": "Sales document 2300000109 is in approval. No changes are allowed."
},

Any idea to solve this?

entry.title: Re: Custom UIBB Not Visible in sap mdg fpm
entry.content: Hi Jen, Thanks for reply. I tried in mentioned IF_FPM_OVP->CHANGE_UIBB , where in field hidden is not 'X' during the debug flow. Then i deleted the personalization as well. Can i know is there any additional setting i need to check in the system. Thanks for supporting on this.

entry.title: Do you want to explore more about the extensibility mechanisms in SAP Digital Manufacturing?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Exploring Customization in SAP Digital Manufacturing learning journey.

Overview
This course aims consultants, solution architects and industry specialists, who want to explore more about the extensibility mechanisms in SAP Digital Manufacturing. The course will especially focus on the Production Operator Dashboard Designer and the Production Process Designer.

Learning objectives

  • Design Production Operator Dashboards (PODs)
  • Understand POD Designer and components
  • Learn about Production Process Designer
  • Create and manage production processes
  • Handle runtime errors and apply log levels
  • Monitor and debug production processes
  • Leverage the Service Registry
  • Publish processes and register APIs
  • Identify triggers and create business rules
  • Create custom POD buttons and notifications

Prerequisites

    • Discovering SAP Digital Manufacturing
    • Configuring SAP Digital Manufacturing for Execution: Basic Data and Configuration
    • Interest in basic programming topics

Please post you question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 
Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: How to use bseg and for all entries in
entry.content: So, you'll have to use two SELECT: one for BKPF and BSIS, one for BSEG.

entry.title: IT 3415
entry.content:
Hello community,

In IT3415, under parental leave, I only have 2 absences visible in the fields. I need to add another absence there that can be selected. These absences already exists in 2001, 

 

Could you assist in how to do it, please?

entry.title: Re: CL_FDT_XL_SPREADSHEET creating two addition sheets by default
entry.content: You may use either abap2xlsx or XCO instead of CL_FDT_XL_SPREADSHEET.

entry.title: Re: CAP Fiori Elements Invoking Custom Action (err: Unkno...
entry.content: I found the way, instead of "function" I changed to "action" in CDS, now everything is fine!

entry.title: Re: S/4 HANA MM - Mapping between purchasing group to mat...
entry.content: Correct path is :SPRO --> MM --> Purchasing --> Purchase Requisition --> Define Mapping of Material Group to Purchasing group

entry.title: BTP Integration Suite_Service Contract screen IF error message
entry.content:
Hi Expert！

Service Contract information is linked to other peripheral systems using BTP Integration Suite.
When a Service Contract is created, BTP will be launched and data will be converted and integrated.

【Requirements】
When you press the "Save" button on the S/4HANA Cloud Service Contract, it is expected that IF integration will begin.
If an error occurs during IF integration, is it possible to display something like an error message on the Service Contract screen?

Soma

entry.title: Re: Label in F4 is not getting displayed for the fiori lo...
entry.content: Issue got resolved after updating the label name in odata service.

entry.title: Re: Pre-Carriage and On-Carriage on Freight Booking
entry.content:
Hi @SFC,

Thank you for sharing your business scenario in community,.

Great! This time you answered your own question:)

Kind Regards

Ajit

entry.title: Re: Transport SAP Cloud Integration (CPI) Artifact with SAP Cloud Transport Management
entry.content:
Hello Artur,

The destination is required to point to your source SAP Cloud Integration instance, on your source subaccount, to define the source endpoint. You can also check out TMS - Transport SAP Cloud Integration (CI/CPI) Con... - SAP Community (and especially the comments from Gauravi):

For your second question: you can use one cTMS instance to handle different environments - and you would then create a dedicated transport landscape for each CPI landscape (then pointing via the different destinations to the different end points running on different CPI tenants).

I hope this helps!

Best regards,
Boris

entry.title: Re: Text in Salesorder, Which Table does it get saved
entry.content: same issue, any solution?

entry.title: Re: Question: Is ABAP performance tracing (ST12) still a...
entry.content:
I rarely use ST12 because I find the User Interface difficult to understand. I prefer using ST05 and SAT directly, depending on the context. If I remember well, some options of ST05 or SAT were not available in ST12. I use ST12 only if I have to start ST05 and SAT at the same time, but it happens rarely.

Many of my ABAP colleagues prefer using ST12, so I have asked them to look at your question.

entry.title: Re: Transport SAP Cloud Integration (CPI) Artifact with SAP Cloud Transport Management
entry.content:
Hello Boris 

We have config 


And with this configuration, transport created and released from DEV NEW, in cTMS is visible as a created on DEV OLD.
I guess that responsible for this is the connection - CloudIntegration - correct me if I'm wrong.
Can we create CloudIntegration_OLD and CloudIntegration_NEW connections and force use depending on which CPI transport is created/released  by some additional parameters ?

Regards

Artur

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration Suite - Message Mapping - addContextChange in UDF is ignored
entry.content: Why write code when not necessary at all? The index approach will still handle the case when the source node does not exist by not producing target output, and it doesn't require maintaining any code directly. The goal should not be to write code but rather solve a problem, which in this case can be done with zero lines of code.
